Package io.vertigo.studio.notebook.domain

Class DtSketch

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.studio.notebook.AbstractSketch
io.vertigo.studio.notebook.domain.DtSketch
All Implemented Interfaces:
Sketch
public final class DtSketch extends AbstractSketch
The DtSketch class defines the sketch of data.
Author:
pchretien, mlaroche
